title: ochrosia balansae
intro: Ochrosia balansae, also known as the Balansa tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ochrosia balansae include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions and infusions made from its leaves and bark, which are used to treat various ailments.
